title: Login with valid credentials
test_steps: Open the Al Jazeera app. | Navigate to the login screen. | Enter 'appcrawler2@gmail.com' in the email input field. | Enter 'password123' in the password input field. | Tap the 'Log In' button.
expected_result: The user is logged in successfully and redirected to the home screen.

title: Login with invalid credentials
test_steps: Open the Al Jazeera app. | Navigate to the login screen. | Enter 'invalidemail@gmail.com' in the email input field. | Enter 'password123' in the password input field. | Tap the 'Log In' button.
expected_result: An error message is displayed indicating invalid credentials.

title: Login with empty email field
test_steps: Open the Al Jazeera app. | Navigate to the login screen. | Enter 'password123' in the password input field. | Tap the 'Log In' button.
expected_result: An error message is displayed indicating the email field is empty.

title: Login with empty password field
test_steps: Open the Al Jazeera app. | Navigate to the login screen. | Enter 'appcrawler2@gmail.com' in the email input field. | Tap the 'Log In' button.
expected_result: An error message is displayed indicating the password field is empty.

title: Login with invalid email format
test_steps: Open the Al Jazeera app. | Navigate to the login screen. | Enter 'appcrawler2@.com' in the email input field. | Enter 'password123' in the password input field. | Tap the 'Log In' button.
expected_result: An error message is displayed indicating the email format is invalid.

title: Login with forgotten password
test_steps: Open the Al Jazeera app. | Navigate to the login screen. | Tap the 'Forgot your password?' link.
expected_result: The user is redirected to the password reset screen.

title: Login with long password
test_steps: Open the Al Jazeera app. | Navigate to the login screen. | Enter 'appcrawler2@gmail.com' in the email input field. | Enter 'password12345678901234567890' in the password input field. | Tap the 'Log In' button.
expected_result: The user is logged in successfully and redirected to the home screen.
